title: Dissecting higher ed’s complex–yet promising–relationship with AI
summary_en: ​T​he California State University (CSU) has released findings from its first-ever systemwide survey on artificial intelligence (AI), marking the largest and most comprehensive survey to date on generative artificial intelligence (AI) in higher education.
title_cn: 加州州立大学发布高等教育领域迄今规模最大的生成式人工智能专项调研结果
